translations.en: On the second through tenth days, God records for every step the worship of a year and the reward of a prophet; gives domes of pearl in Paradise with houses of light; palaces in the Paradise of Eternity with heavenly maidens; cities in the Paradise of Refuge with tablespreads of food; cities in the Abode of Peace with beds of gold and spouses from the houris; the reward of martyrs and saints; the deeds of worshipers and ascetics; the gifts of scholars and retreaters; the fulfillment of seventy thousand needs with all creation seeking forgiveness for you.
